qfa.command: set -a; source /Users/moonk/.hermes/profiles/alphaaoi/secrets/alpaca.env; set +a; export ALPACA_API_KEY="${ALPACA_API_KEY:-${ALPACA_KEY_ID:-}}"; export ALPACA_PAPER=true; /Users/moonk/quant-for-agent/.venv/bin/python -m py_compile models/turn-month-liquid-etf-seasonality-v1/model.py && /Users/moonk/quant-for-agent/.venv/bin/qfa backtest run models/turn-month-liquid-etf-seasonality-v1/model.py --symbols SPY,QQQ,IWM,TLT,GLD --start 2024-01-01 --end 2025-12-31 --db models/turn-month-liquid-etf-seasonality-v1/evaluations/qfa-real.sqlite3
qfa.data_source: Alpaca real market data via qfa AlpacaGateway; no --data-csv used
qfa.db_retention_note: SQLite DB artifact removed before commit per alpha-model-management large artifact policy; compact JSON/Markdown summaries retained.

data.price_adjustment_note: qfa uses the repository AlpacaGateway stock bars request; no explicit adjusted-price flag is exposed in this repo version.

parameters.positioning: long-only equal weight across active broad ETFs during turn-of-month window, flat otherwise

costs_slippage.note: Repository qfa backtester currently has no transaction-cost/slippage/turnover arguments or calculations, so metrics are pre-cost.

random_period_protocol.reason: Task required at least one real-data qfa backtest; qfa CLI supports a single requested window but not built-in random-window protocol.

orthogonality_checks.reason: No accepted/watchlist alpha return stream was available for comparison in this pass.

warnings: Metrics are pre-cost because qfa lacks transaction-cost/slippage support in this repository version.
The strategy is sparse and long-only; reported win_rate includes many flat days as non-wins under qfa metric logic.
Calendar business-day turn-of-month logic does not explicitly account for exchange holidays beyond qfa price availability.
No random-period protocol or orthogonality check was completed in this pass.
No trades were placed and no qfa daemon was run.
This is research output, not investment advice.
refinement_child_idea: AR-006-R1: add exchange-calendar-aware turn-of-month window search with turnover-based 5 bps cost haircut and 30 random-window robustness validation.
divergent_child_idea: AR-006-D1: test non-calendar ETF flow signals using cross-asset risk-on/risk-off breadth and volatility regime features rather than month-boundary timing.
